action-block-desc: — Reduce incoming Strike to 1 chip damage (instead of full). Block is a resource, not a perfect counter.
action-prepare-desc-prefix: — Do nothing this round; next round your action is enhanced.
action-prepare-desc-suffix: : you take full damage and get no buff. A read on the opponent.
action-probe-desc-suffix: (not this one). Lets you plan ahead while keeping bluffing alive this round.
action-strike-desc: — Deal damage (1 base, 2 if you had Prepare). If they Block, they still take 1 chip damage.
conditions-desc: After certain clashes, you or the Protocol get a
exposed-desc: (you) — You Prepared into its Strike; you take +1 damage when hit next round.
intro-commit-rest: an action (and optionally reinforce). Protocol and your move are revealed in sequence, then resolved.
intro-rest: in simultaneous turns. Each round: choose a
locked-in-desc: (Protocol) — It Prepared into your Strike; it takes +1 when you hit it next round.
milestone-subtitle: Round {{round}} — pick one for the rest of the run
mod-chaos-desc: — One side's action (yours or the Protocol's) is replaced at random.
mod-reveal-desc: — You see the Protocol's intent before you choose.
modifiers-desc: Each round there's a chance a random modifier applies for that round only:
nudge-hint: Space or Brace to nudge toward center
overdraw-desc: If you have 0 Charge and still choose an action, you overdraw: you take 1 extra damage (penalty) that round.
overdraw-warning: Overdraw: next action costs 1 and you take a penalty.
overextended-desc: (you) — You Struck into its Block; you take extra chip when you Block next.
press-zone-aria: Press when the indicator is in the zone
protocol-mode-desc-suffix: (otherwise). Modes nudge its tendencies, not rules—use them to read it.
resources-charge-reinforce: to act + reinforce). Cap 5. +1 at the start of each round (unless a modifier says otherwise).
resources-integrity: — Your health. If it hits 0, you lose.
resources-protocol-health: — Reduce it to 0 with Strikes to win.
round-flow-action-suffix: (+1 Charge) to boost that action's effect if you have 2+ Charge.
round-flow-modifier: — Rolled after stance; applies this round only.
round-flow-reveal: — Protocol's move, then yours, then resolution.
round-flow-stance: — Each round you get 3 random stances from a pool (e.g. Strike +1, Block negates chip, Prepare can't fail). Pick one before the modifier.
shaken-desc: (Protocol) — It Struck into your Block; it takes extra chip when it Blocks next.
shop-description: Run modifiers apply to your next run only. Unlocks add Protocol types to the random pool.
unlock-protocol-description: Unlocked types can appear randomly in runs.
